title: UnShade
description: Unshade is a lightweight vanilla lighting overhaul inspired by OptiFine internal shaders visual tweak that removes ambient occlusion (AO) from blocks, resulting in a smoother, evenly lit, and more uniform appearance.
body:
# **UnShade**

UnShade is a lightweight Minecraft resource pack that removes ambient occlusion (AO) from blocks, creating a cleaner, smoother, and evenly lit visual style inspired by the look of OptiFine internal shaders.

It gives Minecraft brighter vanilla visuals with smooth lighting and a flatter appearance similar to the clean Minecraft gameplay often seen in videos from creators like Grian and Mumbo Jumbo.

Unlike traditional Minecraft shaders, UnShade works entirely through a resource pack, allowing you to get a shader-like vanilla Minecraft look without needing Iris, OptiFine shaders, Sodium shaders, or other heavy shader packs.

The result is a lightweight and FPS friendly visual overhaul that keeps the vanilla Minecraft style while reducing dark block shading and visual noise caused by ambient occlusion.

Perfect for players looking for:

* OptiFine internal shader style visuals
* vanilla shader-like lighting
* cleaner Minecraft textures
* brighter Minecraft lighting
* smooth lighting without shaders
* a lightweight Minecraft resource pack
* better visibility for building and survival
* vanilla friendly visuals for screenshots and videos

## Features

* Removes ambient occlusion (AO) shading
* Inspired by OptiFine internal shaders
* Smooth and evenly lit Minecraft visuals
* Lightweight and performance friendly
* No shaders required
* Vanilla Minecraft friendly
* Great for building, survival, PvP, and content creation
* Compatible with modern Minecraft versions

## Why Use UnShade?

Minecraft’s default ambient occlusion adds soft shadows between blocks to simulate depth, but it can also make builds look darker and noisier. UnShade removes those shadows to create a flatter, cleaner, and brighter visual experience.

The result feels similar to OptiFine internal shaders while remaining lightweight and simple to use.

This helps with:

* Better block visibility
* Cleaner aesthetics
* Less visual noise
* More consistent lighting
* Smoother-looking builds
* A classic-style Minecraft feel

## Comparison

Here’s a comparison between default Minecraft lighting and UnShade:

![Comparison 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a790ed950c35e84eb8e5b816831fad3fddfb477.jpeg)

## Keywords

Minecraft ambient occlusion remover, OptiFine internal shaders resource pack, internal shader look Minecraft, no AO Minecraft, flat lighting Minecraft, vanilla lighting tweak, lightweight Minecraft resource pack, brighter Minecraft visuals, no shaders Minecraft, FPS friendly Minecraft pack, smooth lighting alternative, vanilla shader style Minecraft.
